allow: Bash(head -10 echo "=== 2. Controller/composant creation booking ===" grep -rn "function.*store.*booking\\|function.*create.*request\\|function.*book\\|BookingRequest::create\\|->create.*booking\\|bookingRequest" app/Http/Controllers/Client/ app/Http/Controllers/ClientController.php app/Livewire/Client/ --include="*.php")

Bash(head -40 echo "=== 4. Schema booking_requests ===" php artisan tinker --execute="echo implode\('', '', Schema::getColumnListing\(''booking_requests''\)\);" echo "=== 5. BookingRequest model fillable ===" grep -n "fillable\\|piercing\\|special_request\\|details\\|metadata\\|description\\|message" app/Models/BookingRequest.php)

Bash(head -20 echo "=== 6. Calendrier config ===" grep -rn "flatpickr\\|minDate\\|min_date\\|disable.*past\\|today\\|startDate\\|preferred_date" resources/views/ resources/js/ public/js/ --include="*.blade.php" --include="*.js")

Bash(head -20 echo "=== 7. Fichiers marketplace/show.blade.php lignes 1-50 ===" head -50 resources/views/marketplace/show.blade.php echo "=== 8. ClientController booking store ===" grep -n "store\\|booking\\|request\\|create" app/Http/Controllers/ClientController.php)
